nodes.title: Implement open-source actool in Python
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"Create the open implementation of actool in python, using local ./.venv environment if needed, but trying to minimise dependencies as much as possible. Use the system ibtool for validation / comparisons and analyse the existing CARParser implementation for the BOMStore file structures."}

nodes.title: Implement actool Python package
Initial actool implementation complete
Reverse-engineer and implement Apple atlas packing
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"Using different subsets of the test files, figure out and document how the Apple's atlas packing works and document it. Then implement your version."}

nodes.title: Analyze atlas packing with test subsets
Implement atlas packing in actool
Atlas packing implemented and matching ref structure
Test platform targets and deployment versions up to 15
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"try different platform targets and ensure we match those updated behaviours too if there are any. Go up to version 15."}

nodes.title: Run system actool with various platform/version combos
Handle no-icon keyformat and validate cross-platform
Platform/version testing complete - no behavioral changes needed
Fixed GA8 pixel format byte order (GA8→ 8AG)
Add relevant CLI options from actool manpage
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"look at @manpage.txt and add options which make sense for this reimplementation. (we're targetting just macos, not ios)"}

nodes.title: Add CLI options from manpage to __main__.py

Added CLI options: version, print-contents, output-format, warnings/errors/notices, accent-color, widget-background-color, standalone-icon-behavior, compress-pngs, target-device, skip-app-store-deployment, include-all-app-icons, alternate-app-icon
Fix --print-contents to show filename only
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":95,"prompt":"the --print-contents option prints only the filename in the original tool and the full provided path in our tool, fix the discrepancy."}

nodes.title: Fix print-contents to use basename
print-contents output now identical to system actool
Add pyproject.toml for installable package
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":95,"prompt":"add a pyproject file to make this installable"}

nodes.title: Create pyproject.toml
pyproject.toml created, pip install -e . works, actool entry point available
Verify djb2-utf16le hash with 0x8C61 difference
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"There's a good chance that the unknown hash is a djb2 over the utf-16le encoding of the filename, with difference 0x8C61 - check if that can match the reference/test files."}

nodes.title: Test djb2 hash hypothesis against reference IDs
djb2 hypothesis disproven - no variant matches reference IDs
Facet IDs are deterministic across runs but not any djb2 variant. May be SipHash, CityHash, or CoreUI-internal.
Verify djb2-utf16le-nullterm hash and find seed
Analysis partially confirmed: 33^3 difference verified but simple djb2 insufficient
Match --version output to system actool
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":95,"prompt":"make --version output the version we have on the system actool"}

nodes.title: Fix --version output format
Version output matches system actool, --version works without document arg
Add --enable-on-demand-resources and --development-region options
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":95,"prompt":"support the following options --enable-on-demand-resources NO --development-region en the way system actool would do."}

nodes.title: Add --enable-on-demand-resources and --development-region args
Added --enable-on-demand-resources and --development-region as compatibility flags
Implement language filtering with --development-region and --include-language
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"See the description in @manpage.txt - can you create test assets which are language specific to show and implement the difference in --development-region and --include-language behaviour?"}

nodes.title: Create localized test assets and analyze system behavior
Implement locale support and --include-language filtering
Locale support implemented: --include-language filtering, --development-region, --include-partial-info-plist-localizations, locale in rendition keys
Fix human-readable-text output format to match system actool
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"Compare the results from running `test_element/Icon.icon --compile test_element/out --output-format human-readable-text --notices --warnings --output-partial-info-plist test_element/out/assetcatalog_generated_info.plist --app-icon Icon --include-all-app-icons --accent-color AccentColor --enable-on-demand-resources NO --development-region en --target-device` on both system and our actool - the human readable format looks different than what we print out"}

nodes.title: Compare human-readable output between system and our actool
Human-readable text format fixed: compilation, version, print-contents all match system actool
Support .icon bundle format and produce Icon.icns
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":85,"prompt":"When running `test_element/Icon.icon --compile test_element/out --output-format human-readable-text --notices --warnings --output-partial-info-plist test_element/out/assetcatalog_generated_info.plist --app-icon Icon --include-all-app-icons --accent-color AccentColor --enable-on-demand-resources NO --development-region en --target-device` on both system and our actool, ours doesn't produce the `out/Icon.icns` file. Figure out the format and required output."}

nodes.title: Analyze .icon bundle format and system actool output
Implement .icon bundle support
Added .icon bundle support: parses icon.json, auto-resizes source image, produces Icon.icns + Assets.car + info plist
Test deployment targets up to 26.0 and fix differences
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"Test the --minimum-deployment-target up to 26.0 on our available test cases and check/process all differences."}

nodes.title: Test system actool with targets 10.13-26.0 on xcassets and .icon
No behavioral changes across 10.13-26.0 except packed asset compression type (4→10→11)
Study xcbuild acdriver/xcassets for implementation insights
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":85,"prompt":"Look at an alternative implementation in xcbuild/Libraries/acdriver and xcbuild/Libraries/xcassets/ See what more we can learn about the details of the output files and about the processing. Check for constants and processing paths that they know which we haven't implemented yet."}

nodes.title: Research xcbuild acdriver implementation
Fix TLV generation: add BytesPerRow, fix packed asset TLVs
TLV patterns now match Apple exactly. Added BytesPerRow TLV, fixed packed asset TLVs (no Metrics). xcbuild analysis confirmed sequential IDs, zlib compression, older format versions.
Implement colorset, dataset, imagestack, spriteatlas support
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":85,"prompt":"Generate samples for the colorset, dataset, imagestack and spriteatlas source data. Implement the way they're handled, matching the host's actool file outputs and cli reporting."}

nodes.title: Create test samples and analyze system actool output
Implement colorset, dataset, imagestack, spriteatlas in catalog/compiler
Implemented colorset, dataset, imagestack, spriteatlas. Colors (1009), raw data (1000) match. Print-contents for main test is identical.
Add sprite atlas metadata and explicit packed assets
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":85,"prompt":"add support for the sprite atlas and explicit packet assets."}

nodes.title: Analyze system sprite atlas CAR structure and implement
Sprite atlas metadata (1005) and explicit packed assets implemented. Total rendition count now matches system (19=19).
Single-format images stored inline instead of packed
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"let's reproduce the behaviour of the a single image of a given format being stored inline instead of packing. synthesise your own test to verify that behaviour too."}

nodes.title: Create test and verify single-format inline behavior
Single-format inline behavior verified: matches system actool exactly. 4 automated tests pass.
Fix 5 bugs: RAWD tag/version/endianness, MSIS struct, BOM forward links
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":95,"prompt":"Process bug analysis: RAWD tag byte order, version field, BE length; MSIS entry struct; BOM B+ tree forward links"}

nodes.title: Fix all 5 bugs
Fixed 2 real bugs (RAWD version, BOM forward links). 3 claimed bugs verified as non-issues against reference data.
Validate and fix bugs 6-10
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"master","confidence":90,"prompt":"Review bug reports 6-10: COLR float/double, KEYFORMAT tokens, EXTENDED_METADATA order, ELEMENT_PACKED forward ref, INLK stride"}

nodes.title: Verify each bug against reference data and fix
Bugs 6-8 verified as non-issues via reference data. Bug 9 (forward ref) and Bug 10 (INLK first field) fixed.
Compare assetutil -I output between our and system CAR files
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"using `/usr/bin/assetutil -I .../file.car` compare the files we produce and the host utility's result. Check for discrepancies we need to care about."}

nodes.title: Run assetutil -I on both CARs and diff
Compare assetutil -I output between our and system CAR files
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"using assetutil -I compare the files we produce and the host utility's result"}

nodes.title: Run assetutil -I comparison
Fixed assetutil crash: BITMAPKEYS tree used wrong format (standard BOM tree vs raw identifier keys). Emptied BITMAPKEYS tree. assetutil now reads our CAR (88 entries matching ref).
Match icon packing threshold to reference
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"let's find the thresholds or decisions which causes the icons to not be packed in the reference file. We should match that decision as close as realistic."}

nodes.title: Analyze which icon images ref stores inline vs packed
Fix packed icon refs to preserve PART_ICON
Icon packing now matches reference: 10 Icon Image + 70 Image + 1 MultiSized + 6 PackedImage. Fixed by preserving part=220 and dim2 in packed image refs.
Investigate and fix BOM B-tree key ordering differences
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":85,"prompt":"Investigate the difference in the btree keys and implement a compatible system. Create test cases and analysis tools as necessary."}

nodes.title: Analyze BOM B-tree key ordering in reference vs our output

B-tree key ordering confirmed correct (both sort by raw bytes). Fixed sprite atlas metadata: added TLV 0x03F5 (sprite contents list), scale=100, bitmaplist_unknown=1. assetutil now reads all test catalogs.
Reverse engineer and implement BITMAPKEYS tree
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":80,"prompt":"Where our app currently does `bom.add_tree(\"BITMAPKEYS\", [])`, can we reverse engineer and match the host implementation exactly?"}

nodes.title: Analyze BITMAPKEYS tree structure in reference CARs
Implement BITMAPKEYS tree with bitmask values

BITMAPKEYS format reverse-engineered (bitmask values, raw-key nodes) but BOM writer produces files that crash assetutil. Root cause: unknown BOM header/table count relationship. Reverted to empty tree which is functionally correct.
Produce synthetic catalogs of increasing size and analyze BOM fields
Root cause found: BITMAPKEYS needs dynamic KEYFORMAT (only used tokens). BOM format now correct (256-entry table, freelist, numBlocks). BITMAPKEYS reverted to empty pending dynamic KEYFORMAT.
Implement dynamic KEYFORMAT
Implement dynamic KEYFORMAT and re-enable BITMAPKEYS
Dynamic KEYFORMAT implemented. BITMAPKEYS fully working. Tree headers fixed to 29 bytes. All tests pass, assetutil reads all files.
Create organised unittest-based test suite
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":90,"prompt":"Create a more organised testing system. It should include a test suite which works on its own. All reference data should be stored in test/ref_samples All data should be either pregenerated now, or come from a script generating them at runtime. It should be run via unittest. It should validate the file structures, compare the layouts / sizes / etc. to reference data. It should use assetutil to validate output being what we expect. (but skip those tests if assetutil is not available). There's an existing `test` directory with some samples which should be moved out of the space."}

nodes.title: Reorganise test data and create unittest suite
Test suite created: 31 tests in 4 modules, all passing. Reference data in tests/ref_samples/. assetutil tests auto-skip when unavailable.
Clean up unused test/reference directories
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":95,"prompt":"cleanup any test and reference directories/files in the project which are not being used anymore"}

nodes.title: Remove unused test dirs and tool scripts
Removed 20+ unused test/output directories and tools/ scripts. Project structure clean.
Replace third-party test assets with generated ones
nodes.metadata_json: {"confidence":95,"prompt":"The original tests come from a third party project. We should have our own independent implementation of those to avoid licensing issues. Give test assets generic names with counters and replace the actual data with something generated by us."}

nodes.title: Generate own test xcassets and update tests
Replaced third-party test assets with generated ones. 20 imagesets + 1 appiconset with generic names (Img001-Img020, AppIcon). All PIL-generated solid-color PNGs. 31 tests pass.
